mapper.sql: f.id, f.reader_id, f.borrow_record_id, f.amount, f.status, f.created_at, f.updated_at, f.deleted, u.username as reader_username
mapper.select: select from fines f join users u on f.reader_id = u.id where f.id = #{id} and f.deleted = false
select from fines f join users u on f.reader_id = u.id where f.deleted = false order by f.id desc
select from fines f join users u on f.reader_id = u.id where f.deleted = false and f.status = 'UNPAID' order by f.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into fines(reader_id, borrow_record_id, amount, status, created_at, updated_at, deleted) values(#{reader.id}, #{borrowRecord.id}, #{amount}, #{status}, now(), now(), false)
mapper.update: update fines set amount = #{amount}, status = #{status}, updated_at = now() where id = #{id}
